title: stachys germanica subsp. lusitanica
intro: Stachys germanica subsp. lusitanica, also known as Wood Betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of Wood Betony include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Wood Betony is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
